text.message: lol gonna block you all game bud
Since ur emotional, everywhere else i block is a solo, took from u because i was brick fishing
I was at 2, had built nothing and you thought it a good idea when oj was on 4 to take from me
Grow up, play the game not emotions
I will agree the steal was weird
Didn’t think he was that ahead, just crazy ur tossing the game over that
Just got a lot of wood
Wanna help everyone stay in the game
So we’re clear red you were asking me to help green take road from me?
I mean to prevent oj from doing so for the win yes
Ur only chance is to plow him so green preventing immediate win helps i think
Your only chance is to make him the enemy and sneak the win
His win was imminent lol. If i didnt mono wheat he wouldve ported for the road
So yea we all pitch in lol
Still has to go to u lol
Blue u mad at me or something?
Hahahaha ok man. Enjoy it i guess
Sorry ur win is tainted a lil
Lmao oops he cities for win
I think we all know that was a silly move
